route: ROUTE 2 - transfer operator / renewal on the exact birth-telescoping

kappa_j_anti_stacking.note: kappa_j = interiors donated per birth-(K-j) anchor to a Cheb-r ball; avg over 1500 sampled centres; K7 and K8 near-identical (level-stable)
kappa_j_anti_stacking.verdict: anti-stacking CONFIRMED: kappa is O(1) (bounded ~2-3, NOT the crude menu g=4); deep shells j>=2 give kappa=1 exactly; level-stable K7~K8

pressure_equations.isotropic (dimension): lambda * 3^{-d} = 1  =>  d = log(lambda)/log3 = 1.1018. Uses extent-rate 3 (=det^(1/3), M elliptic all |eig|=3) and level-stable branching lambda.
pressure_equations.transfer self-consistency: b(r) <= kbar * c((4/9)r) + O(1) and c(rho)=sum_j b(||M^-j|| rho)  =>  kbar*(4/9)^d*S_d = 1. Solving with S_d=1.591 gives kbar=1.536; measured b(r)/c((4/9)r) ~ 1.37-2.0 (avg ~1.5). CONSISTENT: reproduces d=1.10.
pressure_equations.agreement: both pressure equations give d=1.10 independently

constant_C.telescoping: c(rho) <= sum_j b(||M^-j|| rho); if b(r) <= B r^d then c(rho) <= B*S_d*rho^d, S_d(1.10)=1.592
constant_C.B_single_level_refill: b(r)/r^1.10 sup on [1,10] ~ 3 (binds at r=1), avg ~2; C=2 fits b at large r (b(4.44)~9.6<=12)
constant_C.C_for_full_c: min C with C r^1.10 >= c_full on [1,10]: 3.27 (walk-centred, binds r=2) to 4.0 (all-integer-centre sup, binds r=1). NOT 2.
constant_C.C=2_reality: 2 r^1.10 = 10.3 at 4.44, 25 at 10; measured full c = 12 and 31 -> C=2 UNDERSHOOTS full c by ~20-25%. C=2 correctly models only the single-level REFILL b, not full c_k.

availability.12_gate_at_4.44: single-level refill b(4.44)~9.6 <=12 OK; full count c(4.44)~12-14 is AT/slightly OVER 12. A bare power law C r^d cannot simultaneously bound full c on [1,10] (needs C~3.3-4) and stay <=12 at 4.44 (needs C<=2.4).
availability.how_availability_is_actually_met: not by a bare power law but by the exact 3-term telescoping c_k <= t0(rho)+t1(4rho/9)+t2(4rho/27)+1 with each shell carrying kappa_j~1 (kappa_2=kappa_3=1 exactly). The r^1.10 law governs each term; the deep-tail collapse (min|M^3 v|=24>2r) caps j>=3 at 1.

clean_lemma: (i) lambda = Perron eigenvalue of the finite stitch-incidence matrix (a computable algebraic number ~3.35) => d = log(lambda)/log3 EXACT; measured level-stable to 3 digits.
(ii) single-level refill power law b(r) <= B r^d, B~3, on [1,10] (arc-incidence / curve fact: a Cheb-r ball meets O(r^d) connector-arcs of one level, not O(r^3)). Same residue as route4.
